parsing_res_list.block_content:
KET写作Part9专项训练 Circle the phrases that can start a message.Underline those that can end aKET写作Part9专项训练 KET candidates often make mistakes with of and from and with. Cross out the wrong word in each sentence.
message. Love from Jane Dear Alana Hello Rupert!1 He's got a CD of / by my favourite singer.
See you later! Bye for now!2 I really like the girls of /from my college.
3 The shop is near to / from our school.
4 Are you happy with / from your project?
Kate××5 I took some photos by / with my camera.
6 He got a new guitar by /from his parents.
Best wishes, Diane Hi Jamie! 7 We'll go to the fashion show by / with car.
8 I'm interested with /in biology and chemistry.
KET写作Part9专项训练
Cross out the wrong word in each line of the message.KET写作Part9专项训练
From: PatKET candidates often make mistakes with by, with, to or from.
To: KimExample I've just bought the new CD of Purple Rain!
Hi!1 The film club is near frem our schoo.
2 He can sing all the songs of Bob Dylan.
Mum says I can go to the rock concert on Saturday.
OIt was really nice of/from you to invite me.3 That DVD player belongs from my cousin.
1I've spent the whole of/from July practising on my guitar!4 Only one of my friends ef school reads newspapers.
2I downloaded someinformation about the band of/from theinternet.5 These drums were given to me frem my uncle.
3 Is the rock concert far of/from the city centre?6 Can we video the musicians by this camera?
4 The audience will befull of/from students from our college!7Ican write to all myfriends by our newcomputer.
5 Which type of /from instrument do you like most?8 Here! Listen to this song with my MP3 player.
6 I need to get back home of /from the concert by 11 p.m.9Maggie is really interested with breakdaning
Bye for now!10 Shall I help you fer your homework?
